facebook.caption: If you only catch one sunset in Phu Quoc, make it here. Sunset Town is a whimsical European-inspired district perched on the western tip of the island, designed entirely around that golden hour moment. Think pastel facades, cobblestone lanes, a cable car gliding overhead, and the South China Sea turning every shade of orange you can imagine. With a 4.6/5 rating from over 4,000 visitors, it consistently earns its place on every Phu Quoc itinerary. Practical tip: arrive at least an hour before sunset to explore, grab a drink, and secure a good spot before the crowds settle in.

instagram.caption: Golden hour just hits different at Sunset Town. Pastel streets, sea views, and a sky that looks almost too good to be real. Arrive early, wander slowly, and stay for every last ray. Rated 4.6/5 by thousands of visitors, and honestly, we understand why.

tiktok.caption: POV: you just found Phu Quoc's most photogenic sunset spot. Arrive early, thank yourself later. #SunsetTown #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #GoldenHour #TravelTok

video_script.hook: The BEST sunset in Phu Quoc?
scenes: The sky turns golden at dusk
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip!
